OSINTtechnical (@Osinttechnical)

Additional footage of the two oil tankers struck by Iran in the northern Persian Gulf tonight, both reportedly loaded with Iraqi oil.

The tankers have been completely engulfed in flame, and are leaking burning oil.

Potentially prescient warnings and predictions from @ElonMusk:

It's impossible to overstate how serious the scandal is implicating Brazil's authoritarian judge Alexandre de Moraes.

It involves a huge, collapsed fraudulent bank and its imprisoned billionaire owner, and payments to Moraes' wife of $25 million (for "legal services"). Hence:


Bloomberg (@business)

A Brazilian judge who rose to prominence over clashes with Elon Musk and Jair Bolsonaro is under scrutiny for alleged ties to failed Banco Master bloomberg.com/news/articles/…

"Banned slogans" 🇮🇱🇦🇺


Ounka (@OunkaOnX)

An 18-year-old woman in Queensland faces two years in jail for wearing a shirt that says "from the river to the sea."

In Australia, you can bankroll mass murder and sleep fine. But wear a shirt that says "from the river to the sea"?Two years in prison.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/OunkaOnX/status/2031713951915155607#m

🇧🇷 Polls in Brazil for this year's presidential election continue to show a tie between the incumbent Lula da Silva (80 years old, seeking his fourth term), and Flavio Bolsonaro (a Senator whose father, the former President Jair Bolsonaro, is imprisoned and barred from running).

People connected with and/or working in the Pentagon have been telling journalists for a week that DoD is hiding the number and severity of American troop injuries and even deaths. 

Now from CBS, with some details clearly at odds with DoD releases: 

cbsnews.com/news/strike-in-k…

First Israel supporters claimed the video of Tehran burning after an Israeli strike on the refinery was fake. It was real.

Then they claimed the video of the huge pro-govt protest in Tehran was fake. It was real.

Then they said it was a lie that the US blew up the school:


Kenneth P. Vogel (@kenvogel)

An ongoing US military investigation has determined that the US is responsible for the Tomahawk missile strike on an Iranian elementary school because of a targeting mistake.
